entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 28
entries.excerpt: Jacob walked all day and lodged on the way. And when evening came, instead of the pillow he had used in his mother’s tent, “he took a stone, and put it for his pillows, and lay down to sleep… And he dreamed: and behold, a ladder set up on the earth, and the top of it reached to heaven; and the angels of God ascended and descended on it: and the Lord stood above it” (Gen 28:11–13).…
